description_long: This is a single-story modern house with a flat roof and a spacious, open floor plan. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling windows, especially prominent on the sides and rear, allowing for ample natural light. The house includes a two-car garage, multiple bedrooms, a living area, kitchen, and several bathrooms, all arranged around a central hallway. The backyard is enclosed by a black metal fence and includes a patio area with outdoor seating. The main entryway is centrally located at the front, accessed by a small set of steps and flanked by large windows. The color palette is primarily white with accents of black, gray, and some muted tones for interior furnishings.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, large windows, and an open floor plan, featuring a garage and fenced backyard patio.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway, two-car garage, and large windows flanking the entrance.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the garage, side rooms, and a glimpse of the backyard patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the expansive fenced patio, large rear windows, and outdoor seating area.
description_view_3: Right-side view with visible garage, driveway, and additional large windows along the side.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entry with a single door, small steps, flanked by large windows, no porch or columns, minimalist modern style
